untranslatable_reason: Signal requires IV (Implied Volatility) and RV (Realized Volatility) calculations with variance premium spread analysis. Neither IV nor RV are available in the allowed indicator list. The signal also requires percentile-based threshold comparisons on synthetic derived metrics (IV-RV spread over lookback period), which cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators and operators. This is a risk management/position sizing rule rather than a directional entry/exit signal.
translation_notes: SINCLAIR_DRY_2_0 is a contextual risk management framework for volatility strategies emphasizing awareness of variance premium. It requires: (1) custom calculation of IV-RV spread percentiles, (2) historical volatility structure analysis, (3) position sizing adjustments. The allowed indicators list contains hvol_20 (historical volatility) but lacks implied volatility data and percentile ranking capability. The signal is untranslatable without adding IV, RV, and percentile/ranking operators to the allowed indicators.
